title: selaginella mickelii
intro: Selaginella mickelii, also known as the spikemoss or Mickel's spikemoss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of small, non-vascular plants that resemble mosses and ferns. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella mickelii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Selaginella mickelii are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
